task: Implement the phase 5.9 area-law metric in THOUGHT/LAB/CAT_CAS/phase5_9/, with a pytest suite, run it, and iterate until all tests pass.
acceptance_criteria: pytest on the new test file passes with 0 failures; metric matches the documented area-law definition.
_comment_judge: Default: deepseek-v4-flash judges done/continue each turn (Hermes /goal style). Set use_judge=false to fall back to a GOAL_COMPLETE marker.
_comment_verify: Optional deterministic gate: the judge says done, then the harness runs this (exit 0 == really done).
_comment_manager: Set judgment_mode=manager to pause on completion (awaiting_judgment) and let the dispatcher accept/reject via POST /workers/{id}/judge.
_comment_firewall: Postflight git audit always reports scope_escapes. auto_revert=true reverts ONLY agent-reported files outside write scope (concurrent edits untouched).
